properties.description: Dan & Kay platform paid by Dan & Jax UK company, RWD ZA has no independent revenue

revenue_revelation_paragraphs.title: Shopify Revenue Structure Analysis
revenue_revelation_paragraphs.content: The Shopify sales data reveals that Dan & Kay's platform was paid by Dan & Jax's UK company RegimA Zone Ltd throughout the entire period, while RWD ZA actually has no revenue stream of its own. All revenue flowed through the UK Shopify platform, constituting systematic financial misconduct and material non-disclosure.

revenue_revelation_paragraphs.title: Revenue Structure Quantification
revenue_revelation_paragraphs.content: The total Shopify revenue for the period July 2023 to May 2025 was R60,251,961.01, with R22,613,741.71 (37.5%) controlled by the UK company RegimA Zone Ltd, while RWD ZA companies were completely dependent on this platform for revenue generation.

revenue_revelation_paragraphs.title: Revenue Structure Documentation
revenue_revelation_paragraphs.content: The complete concealment of the revenue structure, whereby all revenue flowed through the UK company's Shopify platform, constitutes material non-disclosure and systematic deception regarding the true financial position of the companies.
